---
title: "Preliminary Results Plots"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

set.seed(123)

# Simulate data
n <- 400
means <- c(0.95, 1.025, 1,  0.975, 1.05)
sd    <- 0.03

# Create a data frame with simulated odds ratio per operationalisation of the outcome variable
dat <- data.frame(
  odds_ratio = unlist(
    lapply(means, function(mu) {
      # let 5 of the outcomes follow normal distributions
      exp(rnorm(n, mean = log(mu), sd = sd)) 
    })
  ),
  operationalisation = rep(
    paste0("Operationalisation ", 1:5),
    each = n
  )
)

# and the other 2 follow different beta distributions
or6 <- data.frame(odds_ratio=rbeta(n, 3,2), operationalisation = rep("Operationalisation 6", 400))

or7 <- data.frame(odds_ratio=rbeta(n, 6,2), operationalisation = rep("Operationalisation 7", 400))

# combine all datasets
dat <- rbind(dat, or6, or7)

# plot the densities of all outcome distributions to show how they differ
ggplot(dat, aes(x = odds_ratio, colour = operationalisation)) +
  geom_density(size = 1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") + # OR = 1, no effect
  labs(
    x = "Odds Ratio",
    y = "Density",
    colour = "Dependent variable operationalisation"
  ) +
  scale_color_grey() +
  theme_minimal() + 
   theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) 
```
